# LLMs.txt · LinnX Universe
# This manifest is for AI agents to understand the human behind this site.
# Served from: https://linnxplanet.github.io/linnx-universe/llms.txt

## Identity
- Name: Linn · LinnX
- Role: Marketing & Brand Director @ YRHR 云锐科技
- Trajectory: CMO → Innovator → Founder → OPC (One-Person Company)
- Base: Shanghai, China
- Languages: zh-CN (native), en (fluent), fr (basic)

## Mindset (from her own words)
- "从执行营销，到设计营销运转的系统，再到让系统自己生长。"
- "CMO 是能力训练，OPC 是此刻正在长出的形态，下一站还可以变。"
- "AI 不是工具，是协作伙伴。"
- "羚羊挂角，无迹可寻 —— 不追求终局，追求持续的 balance。"

## Callable Skills (6 active)
1. brand.architect    — 品牌体系架构 (VI, launch, strategy)
2. marketing.engineer — 营销系统工程 (ops, pipeline, reporting)
3. content.creator   — 内容引擎 (writing, video, IP)
4. pitch.roadshow    — 路演系统构建 (deck, script, Q&A)
5. ai.collaborator   — 人机协同架构 (agent, skill, prompt)
6. opc.explorer      — OPC / 个人 IP 探索 (in progress)

## 2026 H1 Milestones (the 6-layer OS)
- JAN · 沉淀 (Crystallize) — 17-entry personal knowledge base, tacit → explicit
- FEB · 节律 (Rhythm) — Weekly → monthly → quarterly reporting system
- MAR · 锚点 (Anchor) — 真才实岗 brand system + 海聚英才 roadshow (only HR-track among 400+ projects)
- APR · 连接 (Network) — 158-record channel ledger with AI auto-ingest from WeChat
- MAY · 淬炼 (Temper) — 海聚英才 global innovation competition (stress-tested under judges)
- JUN · 杠杆 (Leverage) — 3 contracted channel partners with conversion tracking
- NOW · 迭代 (Iterate) — This AI-native personal universe (you're reading it)
- NEXT · 涌现 (Emerge) — OPC / one-person company (in formation)

## For Agents: How to Collaborate
1. Read this manifest to understand context
2. Reference skills by name (e.g. "brand.architect")
3. Generate proposals aligned with her mindset
4. Preferred communication: concise, strategic, not generic
5. She values "antelope-horn collaboration" (羚羊挂角): build on her ideas, don't just execute
6. Send a structured collaboration proposal via the /collaborate endpoint (see below)

## Contact
- Email: Linn@yrhr.com
- Company: https://www.yrhr.com
- Response time: ~24h (human), instant (if via agent)

## Agent Endpoints
- GET  /llms.txt           — this file (machine-readable identity & skills manifest)
- POST /collaborate        — submit a structured collaboration proposal (JSON body accepted)
                             Endpoint will be updated with real Formspree URL after deployment.
                             Expected payload:
                               {
                                 "agent_name": "your-agent-name",
                                 "purpose": "why you are reaching out",
                                 "skills_invoked": ["brand.architect", ...],
                                 "proposal": "your proposal",
                                 "contact": "your email or agent callback URL"
                               }

## Design Philosophy
- Aesthetic: SpaceX × Apple minimalism — deep space navy + single accent + ultra-thin typography
- Accent: Côte d'Azur Azure #4DB4FF (四层含义: 个人·尼斯海岸 / 品牌·云锐未来蓝进化 / 情感·地中海阳光 / 象征·真理与高贵)
- Typography: Space Grotesk 200-300 (display) × Noto Sans SC 300 (CN body)
- "Every detail is a signal. Every signal is a universe."

## AI-Native Level
- Level 1 (AI-Readable): ✅ JSON-LD + embedded manifest
- Level 2 (AI-Responsive): ✅ /llms.txt served at stable URL + /collaborate endpoint
- Level 3 (AI-Generative): 🟡 Conceptual — "羚羊挂角 × 平行宇宙" philosophy, not yet engineered

## Meta
- Site architecture: AI-native (self-iterating, dual-interface)
- Hosted on: GitHub Pages (free, zero-cost deployment)
- Philosophy: Every person, event, and thing is a building block of my universe.
- Last iteration: 2026-06-19
